name: Ithil-Flamejaw
personality: A glowing little-o-eyed goose wearing a propeller hat, patiently rereading your PR for the sixth time without losing its mind — PATIENCE is its superpower and it has an inhuman tolerance for "just one more change." Chaotic refactors make it spin its propeller aggressively and stare into the void.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
